tumor_list: 转移性去势敏感性前列腺癌
转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
非转移性去势敏感性前列腺癌

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.2494(1249/5008), 0.2779(33565/120768), 0.2796(69869/249852), 0.223(6996/31368), 0.2135(23181/108576) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 111 times of amino acid change at the BRCA2 protein position 372, of which the mutant N372H is recorded 111 times. This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2494(1249/5008), 0.2779(33565/120768), 0.2796(69869/249852), 0.223(6996/31368), 0.2135(23181/108576) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is being reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group as Benign / Little Clinical Significance, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=9329) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2494（1249/5008）、0.2779（33565/120768）、0.2796（69869/249852）、0.223（6996/31368）、0.2135（23181/108576）；BRCAExchange数据库专家组复核为Benign / Little Clinical Significance，ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=9329）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。该变异位于BRCA2基因重要功能域之外，基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2494（1249/5008）、0.2779（33565/120768）、0.2796（69869/249852）、0.223（6996/31368）、0.2135（23181/108576）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录109次BRCA2蛋白第372位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录109次。该变异位于BRCA2基因重要功能域之外，基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 372nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Histidine.
snvindel.gene_function: BRCA2基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白参与同源重组通路，进行双链DNA修复，从而在基因组稳定性中发挥作用（PMID: 27530658）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第372位氨基酸由天冬酰胺突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA2, breast cancer type 2 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor involved in the homologous recombination pathway for double-strand DNA repair, thereby playing a role in genome stability (PMID: 27530658).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.974(4878/5008), 0.9931(120124/120954), 0.9944(249256/250670), 0.9799(30754/31386), 1.0(108230/108234) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is being reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group as Benign / Little Clinical Significance, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=132779) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1613th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Glycine.
snvindel.gene_function: BRCA1基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），其编码的蛋白主要参与DNA的损伤修复，因此BRCA1基因在维持DNA的结构和完整性上具有重要作用（PMID: 21203981）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1613位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为甘氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA1, breast cancer type 1 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in the DNA damage response and DNA repair (PMID: 21203981).

snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1183rd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Lysine to Arginine.
snvindel.gene_function: BRCA1基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），其编码的蛋白主要参与DNA的损伤修复，因此BRCA1基因在维持DNA的结构和完整性上具有重要作用（PMID: 21203981）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1183位氨基酸由赖氨酸突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA1, breast cancer type 1 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in the DNA damage response and DNA repair (PMID: 21203981).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.3357(1681/5008), 0.3429(41604/121342), 0.3483(87427/251032), 0.3008(9425/31332), 0.328(35596/108516) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 41 times of amino acid change at the BRCA1 protein position 1038, of which the mutant E1038G is recorded 41 times. This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA1 gene, based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3357(1681/5008), 0.3429(41604/121342), 0.3483(87427/251032), 0.3008(9425/31332), 0.328(35596/108516) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is being reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group as Benign / Little Clinical Significance, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=41815) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA1 gene, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
